👇 Everything we curated for this Holy Land episode. Books, history, cookbooks, travel resources.

*📚 BROWSE THE HOLY LAND COLLECTION*
  ◦ Every book, cookbook, and cultural item from this episode → https://shorturl.at/r8fsx

*🛍 SEE OUR FULL W.O.E. STOREFRONT*
  ◦ Every destination Collection in one place → https://www.amazon.com/shop/whereonearth

*🎟 TOURS AND EXPERIENCES IN THE HOLY LAND*
  ◦ Jerusalem old city tours, Bethlehem pilgrimages, Dead Sea floating, Masada at sunrise → https://shorturl.at/W2gjH https://shorturl.at/gZT0j
  ◦ Browse all Holy Land experiences → https://gyg.me/WzqjMd3n https://gyg.me/xycvxyNC

*📖 PLAN YOUR HOLY LAND TRIP*
  ◦ Lonely Planet Israel & the Palestinian Territories → https://amzn.to/4uzYQ0r
  ◦ Lonely Planet Hebrew Phrasebook & Dictionary → https://amzn.to/4x9uvrh

*📚 GO DEEPER INTO THE HOLY LAND*
  ◦ Jerusalem: The Biography by Simon Sebag Montefiore → https://amzn.to/3PN5f97
  ◦ The Lemon Tree by Sandy Tolan → https://amzn.to/4dKmbFb

*🍲 BRING THE HOLY LAND HOME*

  ◦ The Bible Unearthed by Finkelstein and Silberman → https://amzn.to/4dPmleI
